problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: If Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine is applied to autism, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
